_publications._publicationTitle: Combined CDK4/6 and ERK1/2 Inhibition Enhances Antitumor Activity in NF1-Associated Plexiform Neurofibroma.

_contextSnippet: mice treated at an initial dose of 100 mg/kg LY3214996 exhibited excess mortality due to gastroparesis. Thus, a dose of 50 mg/kg LY3214996 was subsequently used for efficacy studies with considerably improved tolerability
details: Mice treated at initial dose of 100 mg/kg LY3214996 exhibited excess mortality due to gastroparesis; dose reduced to 50 mg/kg with improved tolerability but still some excess mortality compared to vehicle and abemaciclib
